title: boronia fastigiata subsp. tenuior
intro: Boronia fastigiata subsp. tenuior is a subspecies of the Boronia fastigiata plant, a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its pale pink flowers and slender foliage. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Boronia fastigiata subsp. tenuior include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oil is often extracted and used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and teas to harness its medicinal properties.
